query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, publishedToFeed
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM'
AND gameDate BETWEEN '2026-03-18' AND '2026-03-21'
AND (
  homeTeam IN ('vanderbilt', 'nebraska', 'north_carolina', 'illinois', 'houston', 'clemson')
  OR awayTeam IN ('mcneese_st', 'troy', 'va_commonwealth', 'pennsylvania', 'idaho', 'iowa')
  OR (homeTeam = 'st_marys' OR homeTeam LIKE '%mary%')
  OR (awayTeam LIKE '%texas_a%' OR awayTeam = 'texas_a_and_m')
)
ORDER BY gameDate, id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute

  OR awayTeam IN ('mcneese_st', 'troy', 'va_commonwealth', 'pennsylvania', 'idaho', 'iowa')
  OR (homeTeam = 'st_marys' OR homeTeam LIKE '%mary%')
  OR (awayTeam LIKE '%texas_a%' OR awayTeam = 'texas_a_and_m')
)
ORDER BY gameDate, id;
